review_body: perfect portable size and space saving came like new though i bought it used love it

the first time i used these i was so happy with how they worked i found that the cookies i made them with had an odd plastic taste though thinking i had used some flour that may have been too old i shrugged it off however i then used it to roast some vegetables on in the oven and also got the same taste i made sure when i got them delivered that i washed them well before use after the first time i used them they were washed and soaked as well i am pretty disappointed in this and am worried about what it leaking into my food

i have had no issues baking or cleaning these but every time they make the food taste like silicon my entire family has mentioned it at first i thought i didnt rinse off all the soap so i did extra rinses no luck i thought maybe my ingredients were funky so i used different ingredients it was even worse i finally made a pan of cupcakes with half in these liners and half in some disposable liners i still had left disposable liners the cupcakes were perfect 100 these liners they were disgusting im going back to disposable liners and these are going in the trash

review_title: i couldnt get over the rubberplastic smell
review_body: i loved the idea of these silicone muffin cups you dont waste paper by using the paper muffin cups and your muffin tin wouldnt get so dirty and hard to clean unfortunately the reality was disappointing i made turkey meatloaf in the muffin pan using the silicone cups yes the muffin tin was less dirty and easier to clean but the muffin cups themselves were not so easy to clean because of the pleatsgrooves you have to use a soft brush and turn the cup inside out the deal breaker was the smell although the turkey meatloaf was cooked perfectly now i had food that smelled like rubber pretty unappetizing i forced myself to finish all the meatloaf but ended up dumping the muffin cups after that
hard to clean so back to paper
love these items but they are hard to clean out the crevices

i used my new silicone cup cake liners in my babycakes cupcake maker and my cup cakes came out amazing the cupcake liner is perfect in cupcake maker or oven the shape of my cupcake was so fluffy and full i rinsed off cupcake liners with soapy water and they are ready to use again the colors of liners are so pretty makes a nice display of cupcakes i really like using silicone it doesnt burn and no smell i find cup cake usually sticks to paper liners but with silicone i have a whole cupcake no sticking to silicone cupcake comes out full size i paid 5 and change for 12 cupcake liners i can easily storage these liners in a kitchen draw i recommend this item its worth the money

i used this product to store bedding items and 2 of the bags are not working properly items are well below the fill line but do not stay flat the few bags ive used have stayed flat i would return them but its not worth the hassle of redoing all what ive done already the two bags may just be a fluke but i do recommend this item cuz they do save on space in the extra large jumbo one i fit a queen comforter 2 pillows a queen size plush blanket and 2 sets of bedsheets flat sheet fitted sheet and pillow case wow
this pillow case is not soft and ill have to replace it

review_title: a little flimsy will update if it deserves it

review_title: it works great for storage of k cups
review_body: no problem storage k cups

in just one year of normal kitchen use this mat revealed its true self cheap its glued together the edge turned out to be one big seem which ruptured revealing the bottom surface material a sheet of cardboard thinly coated with a plastic of some sort and the filling a stuffing made of what looks and feels like shredded cardboardeveryday for a year i diligently moved it back into its position on the floor because it refused to stay put even after i placed a nonslip pad underneath like cardboard it was too inflexible to really adhere to the floors surface so when it started to noticeably come apart i went to lowes bought a real gel mat and kissed this mistake goodbye along with my 30

review_title: do not recommend im better off standing on the floor
review_body: i got this to use with a standing desk at work but my knees have felt worse using the mat than it does on the ground theres no give to the mat and it feels stiff ive tried it with shoes and barefoot but neither seems to help i should have read more of the reviews prior to purchasing i converted to a standing desk because of back and knee pain from sitting but i probably have to look for a new mat because my knee pain has returned
not enough give too tough
standing at my raised laptop desk is a nicer with the pad

i bought these hangers about 4 years ago for my daughters nursery i was going to buy them again because we needed more and i noticed all of the reviews stating they contain lead i quickly bought a lead test kit and tested the hangers i previously purchased and the lead test came back negative so i bought more hangers because i had the lead test swabs i decided to test the hangers i ordered for the second time and they came back glaringly testing positive for lead i returned them immediately shame on amazon for selling a childs product containing lead especially after so many reviews are showing the positive teat results

we wanted some inexpensive baby hangers that still looked nice and the overall good reviews on these convinced me but weve been so disappointed in quality about a third of the hangers have snapped in the couple of months weve been using themif your hangers are never dropped a few feet from the clothes rod or your hand to the floor and are never left on the floor where they could be crawled across by your baby then these might be a good choice for you but for most of us baby hangers need to hold up to very normal gentle wear and tearin the end i wish i would have spent some more money on better quality hangers it would have ended up being the same now that im replacing a third of these
doesnt throw much of heat would not recommend

review_title: temperature control is misleading only 3 levels of heating
review_body: this tiny heater is quiet while running there are 3 levels of heating and no temperature sensor module built in therefore it will not pause if the ambient temperature raised it is very portable it heated up my camper during my trips it is very good for heating up a small space i set the heating level at the lowest one it depends on how low the outside temperature is the interior temperature stayed between comfortable 62f to 69f even though it is not a true temperature controlled heater as long as you know your application it is a good heater

the spoons i received look terrible and very poor quality they are tarnished and have a lot of scratches i ordered rounded edges and i got pearled edges instead the spoons are wafer thin and the weight of the spoons is so light i think a stiff breeze would blow them awaythere are slight but noticeable variations between the spoons varying lengths bowl sizes neck shapesangles and differences in the depth and definition of the embossing of the handles

review_title: odd extra wide shape not a serving spoon
review_body: i bought these spoons because i dont like how small teaspoons are and i like the next size up which are sometimes called tablespoons this spoon was uncomfortable to eat with the handle is really thick and its so wide it didnt fit comfortably in my mouth i could get it in if i opened wide i measured and it holds just about exactly 1 tablespoon of water so i think its the shape thats off instead of being oval its wider in the back i think it is also deeper than the typical dinner tablespoon that all said i agree with some reviewers that there spoons would make a good ice cream spoon since they are very sturdy i think well find uses for the spoons just not as everyday dinner spoons theyre too small for serving spoons nobody wants to dish out food tablespoon by tablespoon

review_title: not sure how long theyll last
review_body: my son used these for the first time yesterday and the belt clip already snapped off one of them they do work well though and my kids had a lot of fun running around with them the sound quality is typical of toy walkies the batteries are very hard to get in they require 4 aaa batteries each which we luckily had on hand but i really had to force them in it was like the made the battery holder slightly too small for the actual batteriesoverall its a decent set and serves its purpose well see how long it lasts
we werent expecting much for the price but these are awesome

they came packaged very very well not a chip or mar on them however they are huge plates and i was looking for the 10 inches they say in the write up on them the 10 inches appears to be just the inside area minus the 25 inches of rim they end up being the larges plates ive ever had or ever seen huge as for kids using them forget it they are too huge and heavy for children to carry with any comfort that the plates wont end up on your carpeting good for adult company all of whom are not so drunk they dont start flinging them around like frisbees because they will sure as heck break anything they hit including the walls
bent and warped plates zero quality control control
dimensions once received is smaller than described

review_title: not as good as what i expected
review_body: it let the air out

this set shows beautifully but that is where this product begins and ends its ridiculously thin the materials used in making this barely qualify this as beddingit belongs in a dorm room or in staging a home for sale nothing that involves interacting with the actual fabric ive washed it twice it releases a blue dust that transfers to everything it comes in contact with i even found the dust in my robot vacuum save your money and buy an item with a substantial thread count and better feel unless the aesthetic is your only factor

review_title: the flimsiest blanket i have ever had
review_body: i am blown away by the poor quality i was amazed by how small and light weight the box was when it arrived i took it out and spread it over my couch so it could inflate i couldnt believe this could be a bed comforter there is barely any stuffing at all i would almost say there isnt any for the price i knew it wouldnt be luxury but it should be more than 2 sheets i hate to do returns but i think this one needs to go back
its a shame ive yet to find a blanket that didnt feel like plastic
good quality for the price and was lightweight as expected
this comforter was for my daughters dorn room she said it served its purpose

i bought these back in february on the advice of an influencer i bought white towels grey towels and these terrible blue towels that i have never been able to use after a shower oi anytime why you ask i would look like a blue smurf from all the blue lint that comes off on my skin i have done everything that i was told to do that would set the color inbut nothing has worked i will never buy another towel from amazonat this point all i have is a pile of blue garbage towels

review_title: dont believe that these are no lint towels
review_body: i was so excited to see reviews that said these towels didnt leave any lint behind ive only ever owned one set of navy towels that didnt leave lint everywhere all the other sets have left navy lint everywhere when i opened the package i rubbed the towel on my face and arms no lint yay then i washed them before using them no lint left behind in the washing machine yay once they dried i started using them got out of the shower toweled off and ended up looking like a blue smurf if you are wet the navy lint sticks to you like white on rice very disappointed im usually happy with amazon basics but not this time

amazonbasics brand there is a pretty good rating so i bought three sets 6 of each towel to replace what i currently am using nice bold color and a pretty decent size i am in the process of moving so i only opened 1 package i always wash new towels and new clothes before i wearuse them the 2 hand towels were frayed coming out of the clothes dryer the stitching appeared to give out feels like a durable towel but the fraying was hugely disappointing i will likely be returning all 3 sets and consider a different product

review_title: fuzz gets on skin from the towels and in the bathtub
review_body: i like the product because its soft but pieces of the towels hand towelsand washcloths all have the fuzz or pieces of the towel comeoff on you when you wash your self or dry yourself so i have to clean my bathroom after every use ive washed all of them and shaken the towels out before each use i cant dry my hands on the towel i have to use papertowels so i dont get the fuzz in my eyes when putting my contacts ini think the tiwels should be better than this i bought 6 setsim disappointed
these are good cheap towels
got em for the kitchen work great clean up nice each wash

review_title: do not purchase pilled within a month
review_body: do not purchase i spent 53 on king size navy sheets for my bed and was happy at first they werent the softest jersey knit sheets ive had but they got better after the first wash however after just a month of use they are already pilled those little balls in the fabric and they now feel rough against my legs i sleep in cotton shorts not flannel pants or sweats so its not like there was any rough fabric rubbing against them to cause the pilling even so it should not have happened so quickly of course i just tried to initiate a return to amazon so i could get my money back and my return window closed a few days ago please do not make the mistake i did the photos are very close up so you can see the little balls of fabric that is all pilled up making the bottom sheet so uncomfortable and scratchy already ugh

nice sheets for the price they are comfortable and fairly wrinkle free i was looking for an all cotton sheet that did not have the drapey heavy feel of egyptian style high thread count these work for me lightweight and fairly soft but not too hot launder well without shrinkingthe packaging was strange sheets were folded in a bag worse than i could fold them but they were new fabric with factory smell still they would be perfect if they were a little softer and the fabric was just a little thicker and less stretchy the stretch makes the fitted sheet very big for my 13 mattress but that could be good if you have a thick memory foam mattress

first off i need to say that i bought a lot of these towels in black and in greyi washed them separately before putting them in my closet what a mess the lint that came off of these was crazymy washer was loaded with the fuzz as well as my dryer and when i pulled them out i always shake them and again the fuzz went all over and my laundry areas needed to be swept several of them also came apart at the edges i always keep packaging but this time i threw it all away or i would return them never again i will also put this on the review for the grey towels
i returned it i do purchase other amazon basic products happy with them

i ordered the navy waffletexture curtainprosdeep navy colornice looking texturepretty sheenconsextremely thin it felt like hanging a very thin sheethangs awkwardly with a thicker inner shower curtain liner i can see at least an inch of the white inner liner at the top when hung together unlike the two nicer shower curtains ive had in the past there are gapey awkward gaps between the holes when hung the holes for hooks are also not reenforced it would be easy to unravel or accidentally poke a hole through the holesthis navy curtain also hangs really low almost dragging on the floori wouldnt buy it again and will probably replace it soon hopefully the other curtains in this line are higher quality
better to cover my firewood a blue tarp would work better
im really should return this its way too thick and heavy

review_title: this is a great dutch oven
review_body: i ordered this on a whim as all of our pots and pans are really light weight and cooking has become nothing but a how badly did we burn the pan this time situationthis pan is heavy it cooks everything beautifully as it holds the heat so the food cooks perfectlythe one issue i do want to point out is that this pan gets very very hot the handles lid pot hold the heat and it is really important to use some type of hot pad when moving i will buy another one soon in a smaller size a great buy

this dutch oven obviously is very heavy as it is cast iron but i love knowing that it isnt releasing toxic chemicals in my food i also like that if i have to i can use this over a camp fire not ideal for the outside coating i know but when the power goes out and i cant use my oven i at least have this as an option i just started canning and many recipes ask for a heavy bottom pot so this is great its large for all those vegetables and fruits that you can all at once i do love the creamy white inside im used to teflon and stainless steal so this for some reason makes me happy
my original order and the replacement order were both missing the mounting screws

i ordered them in black well while the initial construction looks good out of the box and like it will hold the weight i need the item i was sent was not the item i ordered i ordered a 1 78 inch diameter rod holders and what i got was 1 14 inch diameter and that measurement is generous so all of these wooden dowel rods no longer fit anything and i have to go to lowes to swap them out instead of trying to deal with amazon if you dont mind maybe having to change your project because you get something that is falsly advertised then go for it but id suggest a different seller two stars not what i asked for but ill make it work displeased

these are pretty well made and seem sturdy enough to hold a curtain rod on my patio cover they are smaller than i thought theyd be see pic next to pencil for reference theyve got a nice powder coating on them and well see how well they hold up under the arizona sun in summer they come with anchors and screws so youll just need a thin enough rod to fit through them most curtain rods ive seen are too wide to fit through these but these should serve their purpose well once you get the correct fit

this is a nice ceiling mount aesthetically speaking once installedthere are a few issues ill note below but overall theyre nice for the priceceiling mounting method is flawed the spring anchors have to be screwed upwards so if you need to remove these mounts theyre lostusually for this mount it is a headless bolt that goes up and you secure the mount with a lock lugthis way it can be removed and reinstalled without losing the spring anchorthe screw heads are small so when tightened to the ceiling the mount can still be shifted side to sidethe screw that secures the pole requires an allen key and if using a thicker pole itll stick out unsightly so

cotton jersey sheetswhat a marvelous invention ive used them for years these particular sheets are a good value based on value the sheets are a solid 4 stars but not idealthe important stuff theyre very comfortable fit a 14 mattress with room to spare launder well and theyre cotton theyre softer than muslin percale and even high thread count egyptian cotton sheets so why just 4 starsthe annoyance theyre thinner than other jersey sheets ive bought in the same price range and thinner than an average outerwear teeshirtthe following comment doesnt affect the sheets value its an its my own fault gripei should have read more reviews and remembered that colors render differently on computer screens the sheets are not true redmore a funereal maroon or muddy burgundy than the bright warm cheery red sheets ive had beforenext time i buy these sheets ill just pick another color

honestly i did not truly expect these to be so nice they are a tad oversized so the fitted sheet tucks all the way under our 12 mattress theyre pretty soft especially after a wash i put them into the dryer on regular heat with wool dryer balls and they came out perfectly fine cozy enough for winter but leo pretty breathable in our hot nc summers im going to buy a few more sets for our guest room and theyd make a pretty good gift too they are by no means fancy high thread count or anything but theyre very comfy and dont break the bank

review_title: cheaply made most likely will break
review_body: dislikes 1 made of 12 inch thick particle sawdust board with micro thin plastic coating hangs by keyhole slots in the back meaning 14 inch of saw dust holding it to the wall particle board not noted for its sheer vertical strength i dont see it hanging more than 1 adult coat on it without it breaking 2 if you need instructions this isnt for you a paper ruler is included with wording that says measure the product and mount it 3 price is a real gouge for what it is you can do better a big box stores for 25 to 30 percent less 4 if you wonder why i didnt return it i live remote and would have to pay to fly it to a ups facility and then pay for that part not worth it

ive mounted plenty of things on walls tvs guitars etc so this should be a breeze two screwswrongthis was the most frustrating thing to install ever this piece of crap was manufactured with 0 tolerance as to where the screws need to be so if its a millimeter off it wont mount the paper ruler that they give you has no predefined markings on it at all nor is it the width of the coat rack of course after drilling like 20 holes in my wall and finally getting it to perfection of course its not level after scraping the mount on the screws the back of the coat rack has already started to fall apart i definitely would not buy this again or recommend it
pretty but not as full as in picture
its a shame ive yet to find a blanket that didnt feel like plastic
the cover was light as expected color good reasonable value

it does the job of protecting the mattress our twins have wet the bed almost nightly and its only failed once that being said the failure happened a year or some into this products life with almost daily washings i do follow the wash instructions which is very important if you dont follow them you will kill the waterproofing on your first wash the waterproof part is starting to fall off i think its held up pretty well for how much its used it would have been better if the material lasted longer hence only 3 stars for some kid that might only wet the bed a few times a month this product should last a good while i am ordering 4 more i ordered 4 because we have two beds and we cycle them so we have one set in the wash one set on the mattresses

as soon as i got my sheet set i opened it to throw in the wash because i was exciting being this set has so many amazing reviews i couldnt help but notice the strong smell the box its self had smells like skol spearmint iykyk put them in a long wash cycle and they still came out smelling like that no way no how am i sleeping with such a smell not to mention the biggest complement that stood out to me was how lightweight and smooth these are the sheet set i received is so thin you can see right through it and i dont feel like its overly soft my personal opinion dont spend the 40 on these go to the store and buy a higher quality set for close to the same amount im bummed because how do you even return such a thing once youve opened it and washed it now im out 40 and no new sheets

review_title: affordable but not as soft as i want
review_body: this lavender color is super pretty but i dont really like the way it feels on my skin im sensitive to textures though so it might be fine for people who are less particular about it theyre very affordable so while i think id give them 3 stars overall i felt like i had to give them 4 because it was kind of silly of me to expect better for this price i think i just have to accept that i have to spend more on sheets to get the quality my princess in the pea skin demands

ive used these for about 3 years now in comparison to a set of jersey cotton sheets that are at least 30 years old these have not held up in the last three years the way that the other set has in 30 the fitted sheet has pilled quite badly although ive found that the bottom of the fabric doesnt pill in the same way so if you dont mind the seams sticking out by the pillows where the comforter wouldnt cover they can still be soft i have the heather grey color and the color has held up well and i there are no thin spots or holes over all they are comfy and are similar quality to other brands of jersey sheets i have bought at higher price points from other stores perfectly serviceable but nothing special
so soft and cozy definitely our new go to for sheets

review_title: how are these rated so high
review_body: purchased these solely on the amazon reviews and wow was i misled no idea why these are rated the way they are must be the price three issuesthe fabric is extremely cheap and looks very cheap second the sheets are very slippy and when making the bed it takes longer as they just slide around and tough to make the bed neatly and quickly they are also very oversized i like a meticulous looking bed with sheets and pillowcases that fit snugly these are not thati have to try to tuck the excess fabric on the sides and end between the mattresses and when putting my pillows on display i have to shift them to one end each time and the pillowcases are enormous my husband even commented on how large and sloppy these sheets are so that may tell you something i do not recommend these even for the cheap price you get what you pay for

i bought these based on the amazing reviewsthe great news they fit as they should and the color is as shown the all around elastic is greatthe horrible news i laundered these twice to get rid of the horrible chemical smell and try to soften them a bit i put these on the bed without telling my partner the first thing they said after climbing into bed was are these new i can tell we made it 20 minutes before i was stripping the bed in the middle of the night to put on different sheets we typically use a big brand name sheet which retail at a much hired price as soon as i changed the sheets they said this is so much better the other ones feel like a trash bag in comparison sadly these will probably never leave the linen closet again

these sheets are soft and cool they are very thin but thats good during the summer months in the south however dont expect a good thread count quality for the price i paid for these twin sheets like 10 each i am not complaining and iam keeping for the guest bedroom as they will not be slept on daily i feel that i wouldnt purchase them for my king bed where i sleep every night as they may not last long before they wear however they are wrinkle resistant and look amazing it may be good to have an extra back up pair for my room though regardless really for the price they are very nice they are smooth and satiny like a thin sateen the white is see through but not if you have a mattress protector on bed in white color as i do the white is a beautiful crisp white color

i buy these for bathing and facewashing and am a repeat customer i live in an area with a lot of iron in the water and even though have a filter for the washing machine water these will get a little dingy over time so about once a year i treat myself to a new pack and retire the previous dozen to the cleaning supplies where i get another year or so out of them i think ive bought these 3 times and will continue to do so its a great price for a good product by the way the softness depends on whether you use dryer sheets but regardless they have a nice feel

i bought these sheets to go with a comforter i recently purchased and took them out of the box they came in and threw them in the washer immediately i wash everything newafter the cycle was finished i then threw them in the dryer and then noticed a rather large bug in the bottom of my washer which is new and has never happened before im a clean freakthe so called bug is a rather large cockroach i immediately took the set out of the dryer to double check for anymore critters thankfully there wasnt needless to say the set and the box they came in are in the fire pit as we speakdisgusting

at less than 15 i shouldve known it was too good to be trueive never bought microfiber sheets so wanted to try them at a good pricei didnt even get them out of the package before i could tell by the feel that it wasnt going to cut it they reminded me of the days when all i could afford was basic 200 thread count sheet sets that you could read a newspaper through if youve spoiled yourself with 800 tc egyptian cotton sheet sets dont waste your time with theseidk what i was thinkingon the plus side the vendor made the refund quick and easy

review_title: why was i struggling so hard to get the sheet on
review_body: in the end it looks alright and the material isnt too uncomfortable but this is my hand after struggling for 10ish minutes to try to get it to fit on my bed i dont know why it is so small and i know i ordered the right size because my bed is a regular twin and i ordered a regular twin size but it was just too difficult for just a bedsheet i rather just go without at that point if im gonna have to wrestle with my sheet every time i wash it to get it back on my bed anyways for 9 dollars ill just put up with it but still this aint it

i overall like the price of this product and it availability from amazon i had difficulty putting the fitted sheet on my 12 inch full size mattress the pockets are 14 inches but the sheet required me to exert some energy to lift my mattress and really stretch the sheet to fit so the pockets would fit and not pop out im somewhat surprised i havent seen this feedback in other reviews it was some real effort to make it work after 23 nights of the sheet jumping off the mattress a deeper pocket of 16 inches or more might be a better fit in real life use i dont like lifting my mattress to fit a simple sheet

i had read that these sheets are highly rated as cooling sheets and we got hit with some very hot nights so i decided to give them a try the blush color is nice i would not say they are soft in the typical sense they are smooth and even a bit slippery the fitted sheet is really big i do need deep pockets but these are extra i have some strap things to hold them in place the top sheet is not proportionate to the fitted i feel like i slept cooler than in previous years they are a good value

warning do not dry in dryer i had to wash my comforter because it smelled horrible when i took it out of the package i followed the care instructions it said to tumble dry on low thank god i smelled it before it caused a real problem i smelled burning plastic so i stopped the dryer the comforter melted it also had some burn spots if you buy this please just air dry i contacted amazon and they were very understanding and gave me a fefund i loved how soft it was but i was also disappointed in how thin it was very disappointing

during the covid everyone just seem to shut down especially companys manufacturers and people operating themclothing sheetsbedding became at its worst sheets are 80terrible online then you have to pay for return now forget thatnowthese lounge pants are prime example how workers just dont care what they sell pants arrived with 1 leg seemed correctly and other leg made for a stick leg this cant be accident cause it doesnt make sense i believe then an still now workers just dont want to work they have to much time on their hands im fed up buying stuff i cannot see only having to return it back to amazonim going back to the stores the malls and see exactly what i am buying and enjoying the day while im outand eating a pretzel from fannys

review_title: if you need them for one time use these are great
review_body: had high expectations for these and despite the price point i thought they would be built better first these are not advertised as leather and they are more plastic than anything else the light weight has me believe the soles arent constructed well either im guessing they are mostly glued together and from my experience separation is inevitable the upper is synthetic but overly thin and not very soft as a result creases will turn into breaks or tears to the heavily used areas of the uppersoverall the design is sharp but in person these just dont look very good they are not passable as leather dress shoes and will likely be great for a few big events or photo shoots i wouldnt rely on these being daily shoes for work or office events

review_title: good fit good length wrinkles and holds stains
review_body: i like the length of these shorts which can be very hard to find they are comfortable and have all of the features that i look for they tend to wrinkle especially by the lower hem which can make them too short if you dont run a quick iron along it lastly if any food thats even slightly greasy comes in contact with the fabric it leaves a faint grease spot that no amount of laundry pretreatment seems to be able to prevent the price is good but the slightly more expensive shorts seem to clean up better

review_title: received a shirt that looked like it was run over
review_body: i had previously purchased this item in black i decided to get one each in a white and cameo blue the blue shirt came with ground in dirt marks across the front pocket i didnt even bother to unwrap it it looks like it was dragged across a conveyer belt or run over i was not able to exchange it maybe because i bought it in a pair so i wound up having to return both shirts too much hassle and trouble for not being able to simply receive an exchange for one ill by from someone else

the xl tall fit was great for my 65 and athletic build husband it was the first dress shirt that is close to the right sleeve length my big issue with this shirt is its claims to be wrinkle free it came with massive amounts of wrinkles then after being laundered it needed to be ironed he put it on and drove to a wedding reception again it was full of wrinkles i was happy with the sizing overall but the material just seemed terrible so for all the work i had to put in to minimize the wrinkles on a wrinkle free shirt i give it a low rating

i go through a lot of dress shirts in a year mostly because ive lost a lot of weight so i dont want to buy expensive shirts what i hate is the inconsistency in the sizes i would have given these shirts at least 4 stars but i cannot i ordered 6 shirts all the same size and only one was a perfect fit one was too large and 4 were a little too small ive found the same problem in several different brands but they all probably come from the same factory in china i tried van heusen this time because they used to make good shirts apparently theirs are made in those same factories

the product is great and love the fit as a bigger guy its hard to find products that fit the way i like them the issue i have here is the packaging basically the shirt was removed from the original manufacturers packaging and wadded up into a bubble wrap envelope i ordered a total of 7 of these shirts and only two of them were shipped this way i dont know if they are returns or what but it was pretty poor packaging in the end i dont think this is an issue as i have them dry cleaned but the way these collars are this has the potential for making permanent creases in the collar there is a reason the manufacturer and others package dress shirts in the way that they do you should follow this lead

i really like van heusen dress shirts and had high hopes here its big claim to fame here is the stain guard and being able to rinse off stains that works well enough from a simple ketchup test i did to try it out its the other things that bug me it claims to be wrinkle free and its not at all it claims to be slim fit and its not at all those two for me are must have conveniences these days finally it is strictly a dress shirt very long at the bottom so any hopes of wearing this as a untucked casual shirt are dashedpros stain shield works well looks very nice quality materials craftsmanshipcons not wrinkle free despite claim not slim fit despite claim too long to wear untucked as a casual shirt

review_title: amazingly good fit from a slim fit
review_body: this shirt feels and wears great to test its comfort in the car and walking i wore it all day today to the supermarket and on errands there is no tightness or binding in the arms it is an amazingly good fit considering that i am not really a slim fit body the collar wears comfortably on the neck the lower stomach area is marginally tight as i would expect with a slim fit for my size but even that is not excessive constant or uncomfortable the sleeve length at the wrists is perfect the pattern and material look great i would much rather have a pocket but it does not have one

my toddler is a tall 2yr old weighing 33 lbs we went with the 4t because we like them a little larger to leave room to grow i do roll the sleeve once a 3t would have worked with a little less wiggle room they arent thin but they arent super thick either id say more of a lightmid weight they work for our mild winters and hot summers with the ac blasting at 68 247 they are not as stretchy as some are so if you dont want to struggle getting it on your kid size up

review_title: pants very large applique is rough and scratchy uncomfortable poorly executed design
review_body: i set up a return for these 15 minutes after opening them for starters the inside of the cow shirt is very rough and scratchy its an unpleasant texture the cow appliques while adorable are very thick and they used lots of glue and rough stitching to achieve that look they clearly did not think about the soft tender skin of a small child sleeping in it quite frankly i would not like it eithernext the pants as soon as i took these out i knew they wouldnt work tried them on over the pajama pants kiddo was wearing thin cotton and the waist was so big it could probably fit a four year old pant hem down under heel she is average weight and height for a 28 mos oldall in all very disappointing since she loves cows and that was the whole reason for buying these

review_title: inexpensive but stylish expedition watch but poor shipping
review_body: my timex expedition watch arrived today love the look of the watch and it runs well but found the green nylon band hard to properly size and adjust with no instructions included as well amazons shipping of this watch left a lot to be desired it was shipped in a minimally padded small mailer with a tube of toothpaste it should have been shipped in a protective stiff small cardboard box for protection the timex box itself the one the watch came in was crushed and torn when i opened the mailer and one of the little pins needed to secure and size the watch band was found loose in the bottom of the mailer that i was about to throw away if this had been a gift i would have returned it for a full refund or a replacement in which the watch was properly and safely shipped

i ordered this as my first rotary tumbler i reload in small batches so this seemed like it would work i tossed in 115 308win cases and a couple handfuls of mixed pistol to get me to the recommend 150 pieces things started of well then about 20 minutes in it died the motor hums but will not spin the rollers let alone the drum i tried getting in touch with fa but did not hear back i am asking amazon for an exchange hopefully this one will work properly

check the torque specs on your scope mounts and red dots before purchasing i have a lots of gear that needs 20 inlbs and this kit doesnt have one ill admit its my fault for not checking what i have before purchasing but i assumed a set made specifically for firearms would have done their homework for example badger ordnance mounts need 20 inlbs for the scope ringsthese wrenches are nice and very convenient but im returning them because ill have to buy another torque wrench anyways

depending on how much reloading you do these are a great value i load for 38 special and 45 acp mostly and this tumbler works great some reviewers have complained of leaks but i have none as long as the lid is on tight enough i can tumble 500 plus 45 acp cases at a time and that works well for me also i dont use any of the stainless pins i just add simple green some dish washing soap and vinegar and allow it all to tumble for about an hour or more and the cases come out plenty clean enough for reloading i also de prime the cases firstthis a pretty robust piece of equipment and im expectingand hoping to get many years of use out of itbased on my experience i would recommend this product

review_title: dont wait to buy one like i did
review_body: this thing is awesome i had been hand separating my brass from the corn media in my dillon cv500 it sucked it took about 15 tedious minutes of hand picking out the pieces of brass i wondered how much time this would save me turns out pretty much all of it you have to be a bit careful when pouring the brassmedia into the basket and theres always a tiny bit that gets knocked out butthats it once its in the basket is closed and locked and the kid is on youre seconds away from having media free brass with 223 cases i spin it 20 times in one direction and then 20 times the other direction open it back up and theres my clean brass with no media in it i couldnt believe it the first time i tried it i could probably spin it less times buti guess i just like counting to 20 well worth the cost

good product it works for a beeman p17 airgun at around 10 yards distance the beeman p17 is able to flip the targets up completely and then release them with a shot to the top target when i hit a target i estimate it completely flips up at least 75 of the time the targets are pretty small though but definitely hittable at 10 yards my daughter also shoots this target with her daisy red ryder although it registers a satisfying ting it doesnt have enough oomph to completely flip the targets upone tip make sure to set it up correctly with the folding legs facing you the stand should lean towards you not away from you the targets rotate round 270 degrees before being caught by the top bar it works for me when set up this way

review_title: do not believe the hyped up reviews
review_body: not even close to accurate you only get 000 or 050 there is no in between u cant ever get numbers like 045 036 or even 075 you are stuck 000 and 050 only how can this be called accurate i threw it away and the reason i got it was because i read it was made in america mustve been after trump left office because this scale is worse then a chinese knockoff with that ridiculously high price tag its supposed to be accurate for loading bullets so i guess bullets only weight a half a gram or a whole gram according to this scale because it does not even hit numbers in between it sits at 000 until you hit 050 then it sits there and doesnt move again until you reached 1000 so imo huge waste of money

review_title: cannot trickle onto this scale drifts too much
review_body: the scale is a nice size is powered with an ac adaptor and has a battery option claims accuracy to 1 grain yep it works but if you use it to trickle grains of powder onto it it drifts when you have a weight on it for more than a few seconds checking the weighing accuracy with calibrated test weights its good at first and then drifts off more insidiously if you trickle powder onto it to reach a target load it doesnt change when it does change its off by more than 12 grain unacceptable for my use perhaps if you were checkweighing charges from a progressive loader it would work too bad its got a nice clear display and can remain on all the time without shutting off between tests if you keep it plugged in returned to amazon thanks amazon

im getting a bit sick and tired of some of the stuff i buy off amazon i assume the rod will work but the storage container tube i received was missing one of the caps and was all scratched up and looked like it was repackaged or used the rod looks okay ive had a number of items like this for the last couple of yearsfrom poor quality control on items to video cards which were used and repackaged as new usually theres a pamphlet in these tubes etc but nothing and no warranty or other info amazon needs to be taken to task on this because they are selling many items as new that are returns or that are damaged perhaps the state attorney general of each state could stop this because this is false advertising

review_title: good product at a good price
review_body: good price work well
outstanding and silences those rounds very well

i saw all of the negative feedback but bought it in spite of them i really wanted this to work i tried small primers first the first 2 or 3 went in and the next dumped sideways and stopped everything this happened over and over again i tried smoothing out the rough edges with a knife but no luck the large primers worked as advertised so i felt it deserved a chance i called franklin arsenal hoping they had the answer to make it work the gentleman that i talked to said to try shaking it and sent me 2 more of the plastic trays now i have 3 trays and cant get any of them to work past 3 successful primers working as they should it doesnt work costs about 20 times more than it should and i cant return it do yourself a favor and pass on this turkey

review_title: very cheaply made with shockingly little attention to tolerances
review_body: i am a fan of frankford arsenal products i am not a fan of this frankford arsenal product the tray is made of very stiff plastic when you try to snap the lid on several primers flip back over or onto their side there are several molding bumps and imperfections in locations that disrupt the function several primers stuck sideways in the loading tubes and a couple even got in upside down the general quality of this product was not up to the standards i have come to expect from frankford arsenal

i was super excited for this to work loading primer tubes is one of my least favorite parts of reloading and one of the most tedious when the vibra prime arrived i immediately took it out of the box and started playing with it primers did not want to load into the tubes they seemed to get stuck in the channel on the way to the tube if they did make it down to the tube they would not fall freely they would get jammed up or stuck i went online and found guys who cleaned up the trays hole and no matter what i did nothing helped i contacted cs and they sent me a new tray no dice this is super disappointing

the vibra prime that i purchased did not work well at all the primer tube fit really tight into the vibra prime body the fit was so tight that one of the ears broke off the primer tube i sent frankford arsenal an email about the issue they responded quickly they stated that they were changing a few things in the production set up to improve the product and that they would send me a new one when they were available about a month later i received a new vibra prime in the mail from frankford arsenal i have since used the replacement model several times and i am ok with it if i hold it just right while using the vibra prime it works alright but it wont blow your mind

review_title: great product but a little sensitive to the angle you hold it at
review_body: this saves a lot of time compared to individually loading each primer into the tube we you do 2k rounds in each session you either need an automated primer loader 15k for a fully loaded mark 7 revolution or one of thesesince i have only been shooting a few year i tried this first it is a great product you have to be very careful the angle you hold it at too little angle and it wont feed too much angle and the primers may get stuck in the outlet or even worse flip over as they exitfor the price it is really worth it you will just need some practice and pay a lot of attention to the orientation of each primer as it is dispensed
poor quality head came loose first time i used it do not buy
seems to be decently built havent had a chance to use it yet
doesnt pick up 9mm brass

bought for gunsmithing work i am trying to restore some old rifles and need a good brass nylon hammer for delicate areasthe hammer itself is made with durable materials only con for the hammer is the brass end does not stay screwed into the socket it always manages to work itself loose that is why i gave it 4 stars also the chrome around the edges where the hammer head meets the end pieces seem poor there are areas of the chrome that protrude and will eventually chip and flake offoverall the hammer works well and is the perfect weight for any gunsmithing workbe careful with the brass side as it will dent and mar quite easily when you are using it against a punchwell worth the money and is a great addition to the toolbox
well made effectivehelped me with 3 builds and still looks great

when i first started to use this trimmer i thought it was great it wasnt too hard to set up and the repeatable accuracy was very good so i thought i had made a useful purchase i started trimming some 22250 the first 60 or so looked great nice smooth cut then the cutter started getting dull by the time i was to 80 the cutter was shot it should have come with a carbide cutter its a shame frankford arsenal has such a good design and are too cheap to supply it with a decent cutter i prairie dog hunt and sometimes i have to trim hundreds of cases thats why i bought this type of trimmer i may try the lyman brass smith case trimmer

i like that it does all shouldered cases up to 458 it some times leaves the case mouth at a slight angle you have to work the case twisting 180deg so this doesnt happen however after watching a youtube video it was pointed out that the rcbs trim mate cutter fits in the fa precision trimmer i purchased and installed the rcbs cutter with 30 cal pilot and it works great it is a lot faster than the manual hand crank trimmer overall im satisfied but if you want precision trimmed brass then get the rcbs cutter and pilot of your choice and you will be happy

review_title: ok in some ways great in others
review_body: picked this up in rush to try to get some 308 trimmed take ur time setting it up and maybe start with a piece of brass u dont plan to load for the first time it does produce pretty repeatable results once dialed in there is some chatter around the brass mouth but a deburring tool clears this up and it may have just been my range brass it trims very quickly which i like i use for 308 but can see using it for bulk 223 as it cuts fast prob wont use this for precision 65cm loads i did have some runout but found a good placement and depth in my chuck and now its gone i havent had any real issues with it and i think its worth having in ur kit the quality single caliber units add up

review_title: great value and with a liner work great
review_body: great value and the material is thick and strong weak points are the strap which i do not see holding up to 25 pounds for long and are not very wide so will dig into your hands if carried very far and zippers are pretty light duty but then they only have to be used once to fill the bagbased on other reviews i put a 1 gallon zip lock box bottom bag inside before pouring in 25 pounds of lead shot the bags were a good size for this volume of lead once the zip lock bag is closed and the zipper on the bag is closed leakage of shot is not very likely i tried leaving the shot in the bag in came in but the shape of the shot bag did not fit well in the caldwell bag but i feel good about this arrangement

review_title: shot carrier bags work oknot great
review_body: these are ok carrier bags i purchased two 25lb regraphited lead shot bags they each barely fit into the carrier bag but with some manipulation they will fit problem is they dont fit under the two bars of the caldwell dft the workaround is to place the bags on the trays parallel to the dft bars the trays stick out enough to accommodate this configuration just fine ive shot using my 300 aac ar and ruger amer 308 rifles just fine 50 lbs of lead shot combined with an already heavy 25 lb rifle rest is plenty of recoil absorbing weight cant speak for higher caliber rifles

review_title: this little set is a bargain it has saved my day several times
review_body: if you work with various home electric and electronic gadgets youre going to find a bunch of small screws of various types this set has had the right bit for every small job ive come across since i bought it the bits are quality they fit properly and will not strip out a fastener unless i screw up the case is functional the bit holders are well labeled and the whole setup is reasonably sturdythe price cant be beat for what you get this is a bargainthe only limitation on this set is that the little handles could use some knurling they are not conducive to putting a lot of torque into a fastener certainly less than the larger bits can handle but given the focus of the set and the tiny size of the majority of the bits i dont consider this a major flaw

review_title: great product and value for the money
review_body: love it thank you

from reading the description and based off of my search criteria i believe these to be active noise canceling they absolutely are not active noise canceling and all of the foam tips they come with do not seal nearly enough to protect your hearing beyond a normal set of headphones foam or not if youre looking for hearing protection do not get these especially if you want to use them at something like the range or a concert they also look robust in the pictures but they are made of extremely cheap plastic and the case is an empty hunk and it uses micro usb charging extremely out of date extremely disappointing an absolute waste of time and money

i work construction so im surrounded by hammering and other loud noises all day i typically just turn up the old air pods but after hearing what apple is doing to censor the chinese people over continued c19 lock downs and other bs i decided to start moving away from apples products so i thought id give these a shot so far the have been a mixed bag the hearing protection has been awesome and the sound quality is comparable to gen2 air pods you can also change the volume from the ear bud which is really convenient the downside is even with all the size options these come with for the foamies theyre not super comfortable and some of the features like tap to pause and voice assistant dont work very well

i love this set the jags are very well made they fit very snuggly in the bore and do a great job of cleaning the finish is highly polished and the nickel plating is an added touch i think they clean as well or better than the brass ones and no false positives when using copper cleaner the brushes are the best i have ever used they are not cheaply made as most cleaning kit brushes truly a very good set of jags and brushes they come in separate cases that can be hung on a tool board or snapped together back to back and carried in a range bag good deal on great tools i would recommend this item

review_title: only works almost as well as advertised
review_body: great concept could be better executedmagnet is weak picks up only a fraction of what the picture shows some pins stick to side and you have to shake device for them to releasevery handy for getting the small pins picked up it just takes many cycles to move the bulk of the mediafair product at this low price point if you are processing any bulk amount of brass i would recommend you also consider getting the rotary media separator or similar to facilitate removal of the media from inside the casings

review_title: i laughed out loud when i tried these on
review_body: i had read the review of the person who complained that the pinky was too long and i thought it was either a fluke or a crank sure enough i tried them on and there was the pinky flapping in the wind i got largexlarge and everything else about it fit ok i returned them i give them two stars because the trigger finger fit nicely in the guard no other gloves i had did but it turned out i didnt really need gloves for an hour in 40 degree weather for a tacops refresher course if you have freakishly long pinkies by all means these are the gloves for you

review_title: well made but only lighly padded
review_body: im glad i bought them but the padding is thin compared to some gelpadinsert cycling gloves or the old pachmayr decelerator halffinger shooting gloves that are no longer manufactured these will likley reduce the sting of shooting a large caliber handgun somewhat but not drastically they have the padding in all the right places most buyers will use the medsmall the smaller of the two sizes theyll fit tight the lgxl will be loose unless you have a large hand and the fingers too long unless you have very long fingers the ms fit tight so well se how long the stitching holds

target and competitive shooting requires extensive gear investment of the many thousands of dollars ive invested in my shooting only a few products stand out as significant value this is one of them the caldwell target camera represents the best 350 ive spent the system is easy to set up and performs as described the camera itself is basic the tripods are also basic the app is simple and uncluttered with no frills however the sum of the parts perform well and are worth more than the individual parts invest your money in this camera system youll be happy you did

review_title: well made easy to use but
review_body: i got the stronger batteries but you better have your target in the shade period 50 75 feet in cloudy or twilight is about it no sun understand that and you can get on target and take it from there on the range to be fair i was using iron sights with a rifle scope or pistol would be different in retrospect i might not have went out 75 at first might have been more accurate at 40 start closer and work out i would sight in a foot low for a 75 yard zero it is diffidently well made and worth what you pay for you are not being ripped off this is my first light so really should not be rating this im sure there is others that cost much more that are not as good

i liked the clear finish on the rod that will be likely to catch less dirt and i also liked the fact that it comes in at least two caliber groups not just one rod fits all calibers how would you trust a rod that will fit any caliber from 22 to 45 works well howeverit did not last long it broke in two pieces when i tried to push a tighter patch tipton has apparently started to make these rods inchina about a year ago they are just doing what everyone else is doing making more profit from something that could have been made here of a better quality but less profit i think that now everybody is making these rods in china i would stay away from them and try to find some good brass rods

first one came bouncing around the shipping box and broken didnt even have the brass outsert for threading jags and brushes amazon sent me a replacement this one was in the tipton factory packaging plastic tube and completely intact inside of the same type of shipping box the first one came in well see how it holds up but i imagine for a 17 hmr itll be fine also i ordered a 36 and it barely fits my cz455 with a bore guide length wise so keep that in mind if i were to order again i would have purchased a 40

this is the best cleaning rod you will ever buy it is expensive for a cleaning rod however after having bunch of mix and match of several brands this is the one that i always pick for cleaning it is longer than your standard cleaning rods that you see at sporting goods store but it will clean almost all long barrel riflesupdate 9th feb 2014unfortunately the cleaning rod broke from the brass tip in less than a year i called the battenfield technologies owners of tipton brand and they agreed to send me a replacement for free of charge i will see how long the replacement will last so 5 stars for customer service and minus 2 stars for product

overall this is a fantastic cleaning rod unfortunately i was sent a used rod that had a broken jag stuck in the end took me quite some time to drilltap the broken jag out of the threads i figured that would be easier than exchanging the rod i have the 46 rod for my 24 barrel tikka 465 oal its perfect the ball bearings in the handle are very smooth and the carbon fiber rod is slick the one thing i would change is the bronze tip ill have to clear coat the bronze tip so i dont get false positives when using my copper remover that bronze tip negates the purpose of using nickel jags easy fix though i highly recommend this cleaning rod

review_title: excellent cleaning rod but be careful to measure so you get one that isnt too long
review_body: 26 was was just a bit too long for what i needed on my ar15 but it fits down the bore and does the job the rod is well made and the carbon fiber is superior to other metals that could scratch or damage the receiver chamber or rifling i like how the rod is free floating and i can see it rotate as i run it down the barrel with a patch that shows me that the patch is contacting and following the lands and grooves this is the second tipton carbon fiber cleaning rod i own and recommend them

guns are machines plain and simple they are made of steel and steel when it is first manufactures is sharp and rough there are many parts of a rifle that need to be properly broken in this is a controversial topic there are many internet ninjas who will tell you that you do not need to break in barrels and other rifle components i have dealt with machines of different types for over 20 years i will tell you that steel machinery needs to be properly broken in to get maximum performance out of them guns are not exceptioni personally break in each and every new barrel that i own this lapping kit allows me to break them in quicker and more consistently in much the same way that many top end barrel manufacturers do you can also use the lapping compound to help break in bolts and barrel extensions

review_title: this system works if you know what youre doing
review_body: this system works it will provide the best results if you know what youre doing first use lead bulletsnot fmj you are polishing not grinding buy lead rifle bulletsor better yet pour your own soft lead second thoroughly clean your barrel between abrasive groups get your barrel absolutely clean before firing the next abrasive group third its best to fire too few rounds than too many start with groups of three evaluate you barrel between iterations this process takes time if you have no patience dont use this product if you believe that lapping your barrel will quickly make you a world class shooter go back to video games four understand that barrel precision improvement may be subtle if youre a poor rifleman you wont see the improvement
very handy tool a must have for serious reloaders

review_title: i dont know where all these great reviews are coming from bc these are terrible shoes
review_body: these are awful yes the sole is soft but thats the only positive i can give i wear 995 but i ordered a 10 bc i like room for my feet my heel hangs off the back of the shoe and so do the sides of my feet the strap is so tight i can barely squeeze my feet under them i figured id give em a try since i squeezed my foot into them and took my dog for a walk around the block i made it 5 mins before i was barefoot bc the cloth between my toes was rubbing my skin raw i gave them to my friend who wears an 8 in shoes and she said they were alright but said the cloth rubbed her toes raw too so i guess if you buy these buy 2 sizes up and pray what a waste of 30

these boots are so versatile and comfortable i got these as yardgarden shoes because i have muck winter boots that i love theyre super cute and i love that you can have them at midcalf length or folded down to ankle length on rainy days i can even wear them on a walk and theyre honestly more comfortable than my tennis shoes the only thing to beware of is that if your socks are too low prolonged use of the boots can rub the backs of your ankles raw

it started to rain the day my boots arrived and didnt stop for a couple of days the chicken run was muddy despite putting down lots of hay the path to the raised bed garden was muddy we literally had a mudfest these boots have good traction were easy to get on and off and easy to rinse with the hose they are a little loose in the heel i wear a 7 and ordered a 7 but i dont slip out of them until i intend to take them off very comfortable

there is nothing particularly wrong with the jacket but its definitely not worth more than 30 bucksi got the small size and i can probably fit 3 loose hoodies under the jacket im 56 120lbthe jacket is loose in the arms and around the waist but not so much around the bust so if youre more than a c cup dont size downother than that the quality is good the jacket is waterproof and lightweight it packs easy and its a good thing to take on a hike it does get wrinkly though so if you want to look your best while hiking this might not be the best

loved this jacket and was perfect for rainy days while visiting iceland completely kept the rain out however it was a sweat factory inside the jacket there are vents on the back that did very little for me this might be avoided if you purchase a jacket with a looser fit another annoyance there was a sticker on the front of the jacket letting you know that the jacket can be folded into one of its pockets for storage and that sticker did not come off easily it also left a residue that i still havent completely gotten removed as i am afraid to use harsh chemicals on it because it might affect the fabric overall a for external dryness

review_title: not well suited for short curvy gals
review_body: arctix womens shield shell system jacketi am 5ft1 and this jacket hits midthigh on me unfortunately this jacket is exceptionally tight through the thigh area and then extremely loose from the waist upi also had my daughter who is 5ft2 and typically wears sizes 24 try this jacket on as well and she ran into the same issues in the thigh areawhat would traditionally be side pockets are situated on the very front of the jacket meaning if you are someone who likes to place your hands in your pocket its going to both feel and look awkwardunfortunately this jacket does not seem to work well for shorter gals especially if you have curves

review_title: sizing has changed so has the quality
review_body: i have old pairs of these exact shows from 2018 and before in a size 8 so i ordered a new size 8 and it was about 14 inch shorter had to exchange for a 9 so size up if youre replacing an old pair im a size 8 in all my other shoes also the squishiness is significantly less and these feel very stiff not like the yoga mat sandals i know and love ive had 3 pairs previously but now theyve changed and theyre not as comfortable i think they must have a new manufacturer or something very disappointing

i love these flip flops they are so incredibly comfortable i hardly wear anything else all summer i already have two other pairs of these but purchased a third pair in white with the sole purpose of being able to continue to wear my favorite shoes with a larger variety of outfits so they matchthe soles are thick and cushy and yet somehow dont seem to add any height which for someone who is nearly six feet tall is ideal they are very lightweight but also really strong ive had my first pair for over five years and they pretty much still look brand new despite pretty much constant use for half of the year you can wear them with casual clothes gym clothes or dressed up to go out i cant say enough good things about these

review_title: beautiful boots that keep my feet safe and dry boyfriend approved
review_body: it is so nice to have dry feet before these i didnt possess a single pair of shoes that kept my feet dry i love these boots they are comfortable great for work and somewhat light for a steel toe when i first put them on i felt like they might have been a little big but now they feel fine i guess i adjusted to themtheyre beautiful the toe is kind of masculine for a western style boot but it makes sense given that theyre steel toe theyre pretty comfortable right out of the box my boyfriend even likes them and looks good in them our feet are about the same size i have big feet he says theyre comfortable and lightalso its not that big a deal but i like that they have a zipper in the back it just gives me more space to adjust my leggings if neededim so glad i bought these

its a beautiful blue jacket with a blue gray lining very comfortable although the arms are somewhat slimmer than expected i purchased both a medium and a small i usually wear small in everything but i decided on the medium due to the arms im 52 and 115 pounds for reference the arms are a bit long which is normal for my body size but might be beneficial to a taller person the length is right at my butt even in the size small the zippers are a great quality and are not scratchy when putting your hands in your pockets and they glide smoothly i appreciate the depth of the hood and the pockets roomy and accommodating and not shallow there are cheaper options on amazon which i have purchased but at the sale prices this columbia jacket is well worth it and i highly recommend it
the product is way more than i expected love it

three major design flaws first the leathervinyl backdrop is folded when shipped and for storage this results in a crease in the material causing a line in the backdrop you can edit out the line with photoshop but for the cost this shouldnt be necessary to fix this the unit should have the backdrop removed and rolled up two the sides are not strong enough to hold the unit up alone this means the sides will slightly cave in making the backdrop uneven again resulting in something that can be fixed with photoshop but why and lastly the lighting is not well diffused this will cause a glare on anything that might show a reflection the overall build and materials are great but the lack of a good backdrop and ability to properly store said backdrop are why this unit is only worth 1 star

review_title: why didnt we order this a long time ago
review_body: weve been taking pictures of the stuff we sell online for years we started with blank walls and thought those were pretty good then we got one of the soft popup boxes to take pictures in and the white background was even better the problem we always had was lighting and to a lesser degree reflections we tried lighting it up with studio lights that shine through the fabric like a soft box that was okay but had a weird color that had to be corrected in editing then we tried natural sunlight shining through the tent that worked best but always left one side in shadows plus it still cast a weird color to correct and there was still the issue of reflections which we fixed in editingwe found this type of led photo box a while ago and thought it looked pretty nifty with its own light inside but they were awfully expensive when we found the amazon basics model it was a better price but still a little rich so we waited for a sale before we caved and bought itwhy didnt we order this a long time ago were taking the brightest pictures yet and the reflections are historyfirst well admit that its a bit bulky its a plus that it folds for storage and transport although we wont be traveling with it but its just a tad awkward to raise it up and down the main bulk is in the top where the lights are and in the folddown plastic that makes the back wall the concept of unfolding it is easy but the execution takes a little coordination to hold the light pull it open without overstretching these elastics that are inside and pull down that wall so it has support closing it is the opposite but you have to make sure the top doesnt fall when you release that wall we decided that its easier to openclose on its side on the floor and then lift it onto the counter again none of this is hard its just strange until you get used to itonce it was on the counter the first thing we noticed was the height were using the kitchen island because its a good height for taking pictures without too much bending and its the only place we have a plug convenient you may have a better spot so this may not apply we just wanted to note that its natural height on a normal counter makes for a reach to put the camera over the top photo hole which we love by the way maybe were just too short and should get a ladder or we should put it on a shorter table yes there are solutions were simply telling you about the height to the top hole and cord storage compartment in case you can picture yourself in this situationinside the photo box its our new happy place we like the overall size of the box that accommodates most items the background is broad enough that we dont have to edit the corners out of the pictures we havent tried it yet with larger things like clothes that require a little space to spread out so there still may be some edges in the pictures anyway we really like the smooth vinyl backdrop unlike our other tent with a fuzzy backdrop that got dirty and then lost splotches of fuzz when we washed it this backdrop easily wipes clean there are a few wrinkles in the backdrop where it folds for storage but the instructions say that those can be ironed out from the backside we havent tried that yet we see that the backdrop is on a rod that looks like it could snap out but we see no reason to snap it out unless amazon starts selling other colors of interchangeable backdrops for these boxes we also like that theres plenty of velcro to hold flaps in place as needednow can we talk about the light oh heavens led light at last its so beautiful that its almost tiring to the eyes after long photo sessions but the way that the box is so white and our objects are in vivid natural color with no side shadows is worth it we have to get used to closing the front flap though weve always just stood in front of the old tent so old habits are hard to break but when we do that we notice that there is still a subtle discoloring that has to be corrected when we close the flap the light bounces off the white in all directions and results in brighter picturesdid we mention how much we like the holes to shoot through finally most of those pesky selfreflections are eliminated depending upon the object youre photographing and the angle through the hole you still may see the reflection of the camera lens peeking in but thats better than seeing you and the room behind you the magnetic strips make it a breeze to fling open any hole and have the flap catch without hanging in the wind weve used all the holes but the top might just be our favorite weve always tried to take top angles but they either come out blurry or crooked from the awkward way you have to hold the camera with this box we can just set the camera on top so its steady and it really is shooting straight down oh the wonders we should have treated ourselves to long agoif we had to find one con its that there is no onoff switch for the light you have to plug it and unplug it the power cord plugs into a small opening covered by a flap near the top left rear in and out is on and off a small inline toggle switch would have been nice and less wearing on the pin as long as that doesnt break its not a deal breaker to this otherwise fabulous new photo toy now if only our stuff would start selling faster with the beautiful new pictures

review_title: great size super easy setup and takedown
review_body: id previously bought a similarsized light box that required a lot of set up with poles and extra parts and then you pretty much had to leave it set up which was not ideal in my small space i saw this and ordered it and i am so glad i did it was so easy to set up you basically just open it lol and if you pay attention to what its doing as youre opening it then taking it back down is very easy too you have to pull up on one panel to make it collapse the interior lights up beautifully without me having to fiddle with anything the only thing i had to look in the manual for was where to actually plug in the lights i only have my iphone for photos and this works perfectly for that and i dont have to leave it set up absolutely worth every penny

review_body: i placed the batteries in service 3 days ago and they have degraded so much in those 3 days that the device stopped functioning i have three of these devices that are identical and the 2 with the amazon basics batteries stopped functioning the 1 that i put duracell batteries in is still showing over 90 battery life and is still functioning perfectly i wont buy any more amazon basic batteries they are also not eligible for return despite the fact that they are defective

although the description says theyre charged when shipped the ones i received were not all had to be charged i put them in a box in a drawer awaiting use the first time i used two of them the device they were in alerted me to a low battery charge after 24 hours when i put them in the charger they were indeed almost depleted i checked the other batteries which had been fully charged and they were also mostly depleted so the batteries do not hold their charge when not being used disappointing so i will not buy the amazon brand again

review_title: save the planet save your pocket
review_body: i did a bit of a rabbit hole dive researching rechargable batteries what i found is that as a rule batteries manufactured in japan are a cut above the ones produced in china i was pleased to realize amazon basics batteries are made in japan after discovering this trend almost always the best value and consistent with the better battery category i made this purchase there is extensive scientific research that the best performing rechargable batteries come from japan of the batteries from japan there is not much difference you might as well go with the least expensivethe last bunch of rechargable batteries i purchased was over ten years ago they were eneloop also made it japan theyre still going strong even after extreme use in high temperatures i needed more batteries that is the only reason im having to make this purchase

review_title: no audio no warning or info about this condition in description
review_body: great dvi to hdmi display quality but no audio this adapter is for video only and it works good for that your pc will have to use a separate audio speaker system this cable will not play thru monitor speakers turns out dvi doesnt support audio and this new septre monitor which is a fantastic display when using the hdmi plugin port wants to see audio thru hdmi which is a normal hdmi function and in turn disables its analog input audio the designers should know dvi doesnt have audio support so simply identify the situation in the description that separate audio system required cable for video only

review_title: at first it was very good did exactly as i expected
review_body: at first it was very good did exactly as i expected but shortly after the first week it started to short out leaving my screen black for a few seconds then coming back on i thought it was just the old monitor id gotten hooked up to use as a second monitor until that quit on me a month later now im using it as a primary cable from my computer to my tv and its still doing it ive figured out its highly sensitive to movement even though the cardport its plugged into are secured as much as possible whenever a part of the cable itself is moved by the slightest bit it completely blacks out for 5 seconds then intermittently comes on and off for about 30 seconds its very frustrating its so sensitive that something brushing against the desk its set up on will cause it to go on and off for minutes
the cord did its job over heats tho

while the 18 mini plug has largely become the standard for analog connections in portable audio gear there are still occasions when you need to convert between 18 and 14 case in point the other day i wanted to connect the audio output of my ipad 18 into the aux input of my roland cube 30 guitar amp 14 what to do i didnt have a 18 to 14 stereo cable one of these would have allowed me to adapt a 18 cablethese plugs arent exactly audiophile quality finish is a bit rough and they have the thinnest gold plating ive ever seen not that it makes a difference in sound but they do work and with 5 in your kit you should manage to hang on to one or two for many years or at least until the next audio interconnect format comes along

review_title: didnt produce the results as advertised
review_body: setupeasy install the drivers then plug the adapter in and connect to your network through the computer very easyusethis did not produce the throughput as stated the computer is only a 100mbps internal card we upgraded to a 400mbps internet speed we thought this would be the perfect the device to bypass the installed adapter and give us a higher speed we installed the card and ran a speed test it only delivered about 82mbps download speed and about 11mbps upload this is what we got before adding this adapteri plugged in my surface laptop using my own usbc type ethernet cable and ran a speed test we were burning at over 500mbps so i know it wasnt the internet connectivityso it came down to being this adapter didnt work as expected wont give you over 100 mbps

when i plugged this into my windows 10 machines usb 3 port it was recognized and worked immediately i connected the rj45 cable to the router and did a speed check it it tested at 384 mbps which is one third the speed of my cox isp connection giga speed of 947 when plugged into a pci port this was disappointing so it went back in the box but in fairness i did not take time to use the included cd rom with the drivers so i cannot say what that would have done since it said it was rated at 1000 that is what i expected and not one third that speed
